---
name: Feature request
about: Propose new behavior or an improvement
title: "feat: "
labels: ["enhancement", "triage"]
---

## Problem

<!-- What problem are you trying to solve? Who is affected and when does
it come up? Concrete scenarios are more useful than abstract framings. -->

## Proposed behavior

<!-- What would the feature do? Sketch the user-facing surface (CLI flag,
API endpoint, UI panel, JSON schema field) without prescribing the
implementation. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Other options you thought about and why they fall short. -->

## Scope hint

<!-- Roughly where does this fit? Helps triage. Pick whichever applies: -->

- [ ] Extraction (LightGBM / XGBoost / future framework)
- [ ] Canonical schema (versioning, new field, semantics)
- [ ] Dashboard / UI
- [ ] AI agent
- [ ] CLI / `cerebro train`
- [ ] Infra / Docker / CI
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other:

## OpenSpec linkage

<!-- If you already have a draft OpenSpec change folder
(`openspec/changes/<name>/`) link it. Otherwise leave blank — triage will
suggest one if the feature needs a proposal. -->

## Additional context

<!-- Mockups, links to related work, prior art. -->
